name: multi_driver_register_mixed_sensitivity
description: Code should include a register driven by both a clocked always block and a combinational always block with different sensitivity lists.

name: nested_ternary_register_assignment
description: Code should include nested ternary operators in a register assignment within a clocked always block.
snippet: always @(posedge b or negedge c) begin if (c) l = (l | j) ? k ? h : i ? 0 : n : 0; end

name: async_load_ff_with_enable
description: Code should include a register with async load that gets enable signal added during DFF optimization, triggering infinite loop in synth_efinix.
